title: Example Project
summaryShort: A placeholder intake project used to validate repository workflows.
summaryMedium: A placeholder intake project used to validate repository workflows. Created as a seed project while setting up the long-term portfolio architecture.
summaryLong: A placeholder intake project used to validate repository workflows. Created as a seed project while setting up the long-term portfolio architecture. Standardized folder names, media naming patterns, and a structured narrative template so agents can parse metadata, map media, and generate project JSON consistently.

sections.overview: A placeholder intake project used to validate repository workflows.
sections.background: Created as a seed project while setting up the long-term portfolio architecture.
sections.concept: Define conventions that let agents process new work without manual cleanup each time.
sections.theProject: This example project demonstrates the folder structure and naming required by the portfolio ingestion system.
sections.process: Standardized folder names, media naming patterns, and a structured narrative template.
sections.reflectionImpact: Agents can parse metadata, map media, and generate project JSON consistently.
sections.documentation: Role: System architect and visual designer. Tools: TypeScript, Markdown, Blob Storage, static assets.
